name: insurance brokers processing 5–15 policy updates/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policy updates/month, missing timely alerts causes compliance issues. We provide a regulatory change tracker instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem_solved: Lack of timely alerts on regulatory changes
